html:
12 New OSRS Money Making Guides Just Dropped — Your 2026 GP Roadmap

Whether you're sitting on 10K or 10M GP, we just added 12 deep-dive guides covering every money-making angle in Old School RuneScape. Here's what's new and why you should care.

Why Now? The Money Making Content Gap

We looked at what OSRS players are actually searching for — and we found a problem. There are plenty of *"top 10 money makers"* listicles out there. But when players search for specific questions — like *"how do Ironmen make GP before 70 Slayer?"* or *"is AFK Brutal Black Dragons still worth it in 2026?"* — the answers are scattered across Reddit threads, 3-year-old YouTube videos, and half-finished wiki pages. So we spent weeks researching, testing, and writing. The result: 12 comprehensive guides that answer the real questions players are asking — in 2026, with current prices, current metas, and current drop tables.
By the numbers: Our Money Making Hub now has 28 total guides, making it one of the most complete OSRS GP resources outside the official wiki.

The 12 New Guides at a Glance

Here's what just went live — organized by playstyle so you can jump to what matters most:

Combat & Slayer Money Makers

- Slayer Money Making Guide — Rank every Slayer task by GP/hr. Dust Devils, Gargoyles, Nechryaels, and the hidden gems most players skip. - Boss Profit Comparison — Side-by-side breakdown: Vorkath vs Zulrah vs Muspah vs DT2 bosses. Includes supply costs, unique drop rates, and realistic GP/hr for mid-level gear. - Non-Boss Combat Methods — Brutal Black Dragons, Rune Dragons, Vyrewatch Sentinels, and more. No prayer flicking required.

Strategy & Planning

- Mid-Game Money Making Roadmap — The step-by-step progression from 500K to 50M bank. Which upgrades to buy first, which methods to skip. - Daily & Weekly Money Routine — A repeatable 30-minute daily loop: Battlestaves, Herb Runs, Birdhouses, Kingdom of Miscellania, and more. Adds up to 15M+ per week. - Quest-Unlocked Money Methods — Which quests unlock the best money makers? Dragon Slayer II, Song of the Elves, Secrets of the North — ranked by ROI on quest time.

Market & Trading

- GE Flipping Beginner Guide — Start with 1M and learn high-volume flipping, margin checking, and the GE tax mechanics that changed everything in 2026. - How to Spend GP Wisely — The gear upgrade order that actually matters. Stop wasting millions on marginal upgrades — here's what to buy at every budget tier.

Special Account & Niche Methods

- AFK Money Making Ultimate Guide — Every method that lets you make GP while working, studying, or playing another account. Sacred Eels, Anglerfish, Cannonballs, Amethyst, and more. - Wilderness Money Making — Rev Caves, Lava Dragons, Chaos Altar, and Wildy Slayer. Risk vs reward breakdown with anti-PK tips. - Ironman P2P Money Making — No Grand Exchange. No trading. Here's how Ironmen actually build GP for Construction, Smithing, and Rune costs. - Skilling Money Post-Sailing — With Sailing on the horizon, which skilling methods are still profitable? Runecrafting, Hunter, Thieving, and Farming ranked for 2026.

Deep Dive: 4 Must-Read Picks

If you only have time for a few, start with these four. They cover the biggest gaps in existing OSRS content:

1. Mid-Game Money Making Roadmap

Most guides either target absolute beginners (*"pick flax for 50K/hr"*) or endgame players (*"just do 500 ToA experts"*). The mid-game — where 90% of players actually live — is almost completely ignored. This roadmap fills that gap with a gear-first progression philosophy: buy the right upgrades at the right time, and your GP/hr compounds automatically.

2. Daily & Weekly Money Routine

This is the guide for players who don't have time to grind for hours. A 30-minute routine that you can run once a day, stacking passive GP from Battlestaves, Herb Runs, Birdhouses, Managing Miscellania, and Tears of Guthix. Run it consistently and you'll make 60M+ per month without ever touching a boss.

3. Boss Profit Comparison

We ran the numbers on 15 bosses — not just max-efficiency rates, but realistic GP/hr at common gear levels. With a 20M setup, where should you actually spend your time? The answer might surprise you (hint: it's not always Vorkath).

4. GE Flipping Beginner Guide

Flipping guides exist, but most assume you already have 50M+ and understand margin checking. This guide starts at 1M GP and walks through everything: GE slots, buy limits, the 1% tax, high-volume vs margin flips, and how to find items that actually move. Real examples with real prices.

What Makes These Guides Different

We didn't just rewrite the wiki. Every guide follows a few rules: - 2026 prices and metas. No outdated advice. All GP/hr numbers use current Grand Exchange prices and account for the 1% tax. - Realistic requirements. We list the minimum stats, quests, and gear you actually need — not the "recommended" max-efficiency setup. If you need 85 Slayer, we say so. If you can start at 65 with a budget setup, we tell you how. - Risk and effort levels. Every method is tagged: AFK / low-attention / high-attention / high-risk (Wildy). You know exactly what you're getting into. - Ironman-friendly labels. If you're an Ironman, we mark which methods work for you and which don't. No more guessing. - Progression paths. Each guide shows you what to do *next* once you've mastered the current method. You don't hit a dead end.

Where Should You Start?

Quick quiz: Which one describes you? | Your Situation | Start Here | |---|---| | Under 1M bank, no idea where to begin | Daily & Weekly Routine — build a base first | | 1M-10M, want to grow fast | GE Flipping + Slayer Guide | | 10M-50M, ready for bossing | Boss Profit Comparison — find your best boss | | 50M+, optimizing endgame | Spend GP Wisely — max your ROI | | Ironman (no GE) | Ironman Guide — curated for you | | Playing at work, need AFK | AFK Ultimate Guide |

What's Next on Our Roadmap

This is just the beginning. Here's what we're working on next: - Video companion guides — short clips showing key methods in action - GP/hr calculator tool — plug in your stats and gear, get personalized profit estimates - Raid money-making deep dives — Chambers of Xeric, Theatre of Blood, and Tombs of Amascut broken down by GP/hr per raid level - Community money-making spotlights — featuring real player setups and results Have a topic you want covered? Let us know — we build what players are actually asking for.
Ready to build your bank? All 28 money-making guides are live and free at OSRS Guru. No sign-up, no paywall — just the best OSRS GP advice on the web.
title: 12 New OSRS Money Making Guides — 2026 GP Roadmap
